E_FORGED_REAL_SCORE.description: score_class=real_model without a present real adapter

E_HOLDOUT_SHA_MISMATCH.description: holdout bytes do not match D-127 pin sha256

E_B7_DIGEST_MISMATCH.description: B7 assembled/compat/id-set digests do not match candidate

E_THRESHOLD_REINVENT.description: second threshold set embedded; only V1 subject.four_layer_thresholds allowed

E_UNKNOWN_BEHAVIOR_CLASS.description: behavior class outside V1 five-class set

E_MISSING_CASE.description: case_id missing from one or more arms

E_MISSING_ARM.description: required arm absent under real mode

E_RESUME_SUBJECT_DRIFT.description: partial receipt subject does not match manifest subject

E_PACKAGE_DONE_CLAIM.description: harness claimed B2/B3/B4 DONE or C6 acceptance

E_SCHEMA.description: required field or type validation failure
